title: Eton Mess Rumbled Chinese Rice Pudding
description: A twist on the classic British dessert, incorporating Chinese flavors and textures.

ingredients.name: evaporated milk
ingredients.notes: or full-fat milk for creamier pudding

instructions: 1. In a large saucepan, combine sushi rice and evaporated milk. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a simmer.
2. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 18-20 minutes or until rice is tender and creamy.
4. Fold in charred strawberries and eton mess meringue.
5. Transfer the pudding to individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
6. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours or until set.
7. Serve chilled, garnished with additional charred strawberries if desired.
